creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
Reviewing as per bug #193693, I propose we mark this RESOLVED/DUPLICATE of #180704.

It looks like bug #180704 has obsoleted this patch.  The changes in #180704 allow dspam to use whatever the installed mysql is, so there is no need to specify the mysql flavor (percona, mongodb, etc) in dspam itself.

The changelog from that patch can be seen here:

http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/mail/dspam/Makefile?revision=338031&view=markup
